description: ENS DAO grants data: formal grant disbursements (derived from ledger) and small grants (Snapshot)
notes: grants.json is derived from bronze/financial/ens_ledger_transactions.csv by filtering grant categories. smallgrants_proposals/votes fetched via Snapshot GraphQL API.

grants.json.description: Formal ENS DAO grant disbursements extracted from the ENS ledger — covers Eco Grants, PG Grants, Small Grants, Gitcoin Grants, and more

schema_hints.title: string (recipient name)
schema_hints.status: string (always 'awarded' — ledger only contains executed txns)
schema_hints.description: string (ledger category, e.g. 'Eco. Grants', 'PG Large Grants')
schema_hints.value_usd: float (USD value at time of transaction)

provenance.query_or_method: Filter rows where Category contains 'grant' (case-insensitive), map to stg_grants schema
provenance.notes: amount_requested is null — the ledger records actual disbursements only, not applications. 11 grant categories: Discretionary Grants, Eco. Grants, Eco. Small Grants, Gitcoin Grants, Grant Platform, Growth Grants, Mini Grants, PG Grants, PG Large Grants, PG Small Grants, Retro Grants. Total value: ~$3.3M USD.
Raw API response objects, no transforms applied

smallgrants_votes.json.description: Individual votes cast on small grants proposals

provenance.covers_period: all votes across all small grants proposals
